9/30/2025
848 TRNSPRTN_NO_RSPNS_CD TRNSPRTN_NO_RSPNS_CD A1250X Transportation: Resident unable to respond CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the resident is unable to respond regarding lack of transportation. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
discontinued 9/30/2025
849 TRNSPRTN_DCLN_RSPNS_CD TRNSPRTN_DCLN_RSPNS_CD A1250Y Transportation: Resident declines to respond CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the resident declines to respond regarding lack of transportation.
